about.title: Mengenai Toroongo
about.subtitle: Kami membina masa depan e-dagang — pasaran global di mana setiap penjual boleh bersinar dan setiap pembeli boleh menemui sesuatu yang luar biasa.
about.missionDesc: Toroongo memperkasakan penjual untuk membina jenama mereka sambil memberikan akses kepada pembeli ke pasaran global yang dipilih susun. Kami percaya dalam mewujudkan ekosistem di mana kualiti, kepercayaan dan kreativiti berkembang.
about.globalReachDesc: Menghubungkan penjual and pembeli merentasi sempadan, menjadikan perdagangan benar-benar tanpa sempadan.
about.trustSafetyDesc: Perlindungan pembeli, penjual yang disahkan, dan pembayaran selamat pada setiap transaksi.
about.communityDesc: Membina hubungan yang berkekalan antara penjual dan pelanggan setia mereka.
about.innovationDesc: Sentiasa menambah baik pengalaman membeli-belah dan menjual dengan alat yang canggih.
about.ctaSubtitle: Sama ada anda pembeli atau penjual, ada tempat untuk anda di Toroongo.

contact.title: Hubungi Kami
contact.subtitle: Ada soalan? Kami ingin mendengar daripada anda.
contact.subject: Subjek

help.title: Pusat Bantuan
help.subtitle: Cari jawapan kepada soalan lazim atau hubungi pasukan sokongan kami.

faq.q: Bagaimanakah cara untuk saya menjejaki pesanan saya?
faq.a: Pergi ke Akaun Saya > Pesanan Saya untuk melihat maklumat penjejakan masa nyata bagi semua pembelian anda.
Kebanyakan item boleh dipulangkan dalam masa 30 hari selepas penghantaran. Semak dasar kedai penjual untuk butiran khusus.

faq.q: Bagaimanakah cara untuk saya menjadi penjual?
faq.a: Klik 'Jual di Toroongo' dan cipta akaun penjual percuma. Anda boleh mula menyenaraikan produk dengan segera.
Sudah tentu. Semua pembayaran diproses melalui sistem yang disulitkan dan patuh PCI. Kami tidak pernah menyimpan butiran kad penuh anda.

faq.q: Bagaimanakah cara untuk saya menghubungi penjual?
faq.a: Pergi ke halaman kedai penjual dan gunakan ciri 'Mesej', atau carinya di bahagian Mesej Akaun anda.

faq.q: Apa yang berlaku jika saya menerima item yang rosak?
faq.a: Buka pertikaian melalui halaman pesanan anda dan pasukan kami akan membantu menyelesaikannya dalam masa 48 jam.

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the Toroongo platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, you may not use our services.

sections.title: 2. User Accounts
sections.content: You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials.

sections.title: 3. Buyer Responsibilities
sections.content: Buyers agree to pay for items purchased, provide accurate shipping information, and communicate respectfully with sellers.

sections.title: 4. Seller Obligations
sections.content: Sellers must provide accurate product descriptions, ship orders promptly, and comply with all applicable laws.

sections.title: 5. Prohibited Activities
sections.content: Users may not sell counterfeit goods, engage in fraud, or harass other users while using the platform.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: Toroongo acts as a marketplace facilitator and is not responsible for the quality or legality of items sold by third-party sellers.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email) as well as usage data to improve your experience.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.content: We use your data to process orders, personalize your shopping experience, and prevent fraud.

sections.title: 3. Data Sharing
sections.content: We share necessary information with sellers to fulfill orders. We do not sell personal data to third parties.

sections.title: 4. Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption to protect your information.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights
sections.content: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time.

hero.title: Sell on Toroongo
hero.subtitle: Launch your online store in minutes. Reach millions of buyers with your own customizable storefront.

f1.title: Your Own Storefront
f1.desc: Customize your shop with your brand colors, logo, and banner.

f2.title: Powerful Analytics
f2.desc: Track sales, revenue, and customer insights with your seller dashboard.

f3.title: Global Audience
f3.desc: Access millions of buyers from around the world through the Toroongo marketplace.

f4.title: Easy Management
f4.desc: List products, manage orders, and handle messages — all from one place.

s1.title: Sign Up
s1.desc: Create your seller account in under 2 minutes.

s2.title: List Products
s2.desc: Add your products, set prices, and upload images.

s3.title: Start Selling
s3.desc: Your store goes live and orders start coming in.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Keep 100% of your sales with 0% transaction fees.

returns.title: Returns & Refunds
returns.subtitle: We want you to love every purchase. If something is not right, we make returns easy.

h1.title: 30-Day Returns
h1.desc: Return most items within 30 days of delivery.

h2.title: Free Return Shipping
h2.desc: We cover return shipping on eligible items.

steps.title: Initiate Return
steps.desc: Go to My Orders and select the item you want to return.

steps.title: Pack & Ship
steps.desc: Repackage the item and ship it using the provided label.

steps.title: Get Refunded
steps.desc: Once inspected, your refund will be processed promptly.

cta.title: Need to Return Something?
cta.subtitle: Start a return from your order history page or contact our support team.

careers.title: Join the Toroongo Team
careers.subtitle: Help us reshape the future of e-commerce.

p1.title: Remote Friendly
p1.desc: Work from anywhere in the world.

p2.title: Health & Wellness
p2.desc: Full medical, dental, and vision coverage.

p4.title: Equity Package
p4.desc: Every team member is an owner.

careers.noRole: Don't see a role for you?
careers.noRoleDesc: Send us your resume for future openings.

press.title: Press & Media
press.subtitle: Get the latest news about Toroongo.
press.assetsDesc: Download our logo and media kit.

shipping.title: Shipping & Delivery
shipping.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how your orders are shipped.

processing.title: Order Processing
processing.desc: Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days. You will receive a confirmation email once your order ships.

tracking.title: Tracking Your Order
tracking.desc: Once your order has shipped, you can track it in real-time through your account dashboard.

global.title: Global Shipping & Core Markets
global.desc1: We are a global marketplace accessible everywhere. International orders may be subject to customs duties.
global.coreDesc: We heavily focus on our 6 core markets: Bangladesh, Nepal, Malaysia, UAE, Indonesia, and India.

protection.title: Shipping Protection
protection.desc: All shipments are insured against loss and damage during transit.

sections.title: 1. What Are Cookies
sections.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help us remember your preferences.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Cookies
sections.content: We use cookies for essential functions, preferences, analytics, and marketing.

sections.title: 3. Third-Party Cookies
sections.content: Some cookies are placed by third-party services like Google Analytics and payment processors.

sections.title: 4. Managing Cookies
sections.content: You can control cookies through your browser settings or our consent banner.

sellerResources.subtitle: Guides, tutorials, and tools to help you succeed.
